para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 KI 07/13/17 Initial release.

memberdef.name: resolution_table
memberdef.initializer:
= { XVIDC_VM_640x480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_800x600_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1024x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_720_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1600x1200_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1366x768_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1080_60_P, XVIDC_VM_UHD_30_P, XVIDC_VM_UHD_60_P, XVIDC_VM_2560x1600_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1280x1024_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1792x1344_60_P, XVIDC_VM_848x480_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1280x960_60_P, XVIDC_VM_1920x1440_60_P, XVIDC_VM_USE_EDID_PREFERRED,
XVIDC_VM_1920x1080_60_P_RB,
XVIDC_VM_3840x2160_60_P_RB, XVIDC_VM_3840x2160_120_P_RB2, XVIDC_VM_7680x4320_30_P_RB, XVIDC_VM_7680x4320_30_DELL
}

briefdescription.para: This function to convert integer to hex.
This function is a non-blocking UART return byte.

memberdef.argsstring: (u16 comp1, u16 comp2, u16 comp3, XVidC_VideoTimingMode TimingTable, user_config_struct user_config, u8 timeout, u8 LineRate, u8 LaneCount)
memberdef.name: XVidFrameCrc_Compare

briefdescription.para: This function compares CRC values of Video components.
This function to get uart input from user.
